arts.ttl: Carlisle United confirm loan deal for teenager Hopper
arts.sum: Teenage Carlisle United prospect Dan Hopper will spend the rest of the season with Penrith, it's been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Update on player who was stretchered off against Carlisle United
arts.sum: The Fleetwood Town striker stretchered off against Carlisle United has been ruled out with a long-term injury.

arts.ttl: In pictures: Carlisle United fans at the Fleetwood game!
arts.sum: Check out a bumper fans gallery as 1,087 travelling supporters cheered Carlisle United to a vital 2-1 win at Fleetwood Town.
